mission.title: keycloak: OAuth login error with custom scheme
mission.description: OAuth login error with custom scheme. This issue affects 22+ users.

steps.title: Identify keycloak troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your keycloak installation:
```bash
keycloak version
keycloak status 2>&1 | head -20
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review keycloak configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant keycloak configuration:
### Before reporting an issue

- [X] I have read and understood the above terms for submitting issues, and I understand that my issue may be closed without action if I do not follow them.

steps.title: Apply the fix for OAuth login error with custom scheme
steps.description:
While according to the [RFC 3986](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3986#section-3), empty hostnames / authority sections are allowed, the KeycloakUriBuilder did not allow these. These lead to issues with redirect uris without a Hostname, for example `immich.app:///oauth-redirect`. This PR allows URIs without a hostname.

This PR fixes #32623

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm OAuth login error with custom scheme is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test keycloak to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
While according to the [RFC 3986](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3986#section-3), empty hostnames / authority sections are allowed, the KeycloakUriBuilder did not allow these. These lead to issues with redirect uris without a Hostname, for example `immich.app:///oauth-redirect`. This PR allows URIs without a hostname.

This PR fixes #32623

prerequisites.description: A working keycloak installation or development environment.
